name: Render for Startups
summary: Cloud platform for app deployment with dedicated tiers for AI workloads and scaling companies.
benefits: AI Tier: $100,000 in startup credits plus 1:1 onboarding
Build Tier: $5,000 in credits via partner referral
Prototype Tier: $500 in credits for self-funded startups
eligibility: AI tier requires $2.5M+ funding from top-tier VCs
Prototype tier requires min $25K seed funding
Build/Scale tiers require application through enrolled partner

benefits_evidence.claim: AI Tier: $100,000 in startup credits plus 1:1 onboarding
